title: Crepidium latisegmentum
taxonomy: Crepidium latisegmentum is classified as a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. More specifically, it belongs to the genus Crepidium, which is a group of terrestrial orchids. The species is native to Central and South America, and its classification reflects its unique characteristics and adaptations. Within the Orchidaceae family, Crepidium latisegmentum is part of a larger group of plants that share similar features and growth habits. Its classification as an orchid species underscores its importance in the world of botany and ecology.
